title: bidens xilinensis
intro: Bidens xilinensis is a plant species commonly known as the Alpine Beggar-ticks, belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and treating digestive issues. Bidens xilinensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or decoction, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
